data.body: C3 (2711) PASS first try (0 blocking, 20 advisory — mostly false-negatives from reviewer seeing pre-C1/C2 origin/main, rest handled by impl/tests). Implemented: lock_backend+lock_lease_secs config; ref-backend dispatch in acquire/release/check_phase_gate; gate helpers read_gate/set_gate/clear_gate on refs/reconciler/gate ({gated_mode}); ReconcileLockLost; _Heartbeat daemon in __main__ + abort_check threaded run_pass->reconcile_once->applier.apply per-mutation; workflow refs/reconciler/* fetch; docs (concurrency I6, architecture, ADR C3 section+cutover note). Trimmed _advisory_lock.py to 799 LOC (under 800 gate). 7 new ref-backend tests + full 1147 reconciler suite green; lint+typecheck clean. Claimed, committing stacked on C2.
